subject: Thanks.
body:
Hi Jeff
Thank you very much. 
We are in the apartment. So cute. And your team prepared it with so much attention to details. 
Thank you very much. It is so helpful for this task of writing a book. 
I would be glad to talk over the phone to thank you again in my own voice. 
Pl send me the right number. 
Best
EB

Sent from my iPhone
